The '''First Battle of Taul''' took place between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on the misty [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taul/Legends|Taul]].

==Background==
The Empire had largely ignored the swampy world of Taul and was unaware of the existence of a small Rebel base there. The Empire discovered the Rebel presence by chance. One of the [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] sent out by the Empire in search of the Rebel base on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] was dispatched to Taul. When the Empire lost contact with the [[Droid/Legends|droid]], they sent the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]], the [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']] to investigate the matter.

==The battle==
The ''Dominator'' arrived out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the morning local time, and immediately began dispatching troops to the surface of the planet. Due to the conditions of the battlefield, the Empire did not use heavy [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], but deployed [[battle skiff]]s, [[attack droid]]s, [[Wetland assault stormtrooper|swamptroopers]], and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]] instead. The repulsorlift-based battle platforms and troops made it easier for the Imperials to traverse the swampy terrain.

The Rebels were better equipped for the conditions, and the Imperials suffered from various technical problems with their battleskiffs and spacetroopers. The battle went stalemate for a while with heavy causalities on both sides.

Realizing that they probably would not stand a chance in the end, the Rebels initiated an evacuation process, and the battle developed into a desperate chase for the Rebel leaders, [[Krendan]], [[Maidtha Fait]], and [[Warl Thimbus]] and their respective [[Squad/Legends|squads]] before they could reach their [[Transport/Legends|transports]].

Eventually, the Imperials managed to infiltrate the Rebel command center and destroy its [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] which allowed the ''Dominator'' to initiate a [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]], laying the Rebel base to waste.

==Aftermath==
The Empire emerged victorious, but at great costs. In addition, several Rebel transport ships managed to escape the surface of the planet. These were pursued by the ''Dominator''. Before the departure of the Star Destroyer, a team of Imperial troops were dispatched to the planet to find and destroy any possible remaining Rebel survivors. The operation developed into a [[Skirmish on Taul|skirmish]].
